name.example: Hic velit voluptas accusamus aliquid aut dignissimos.

role.description: The role granted by a permission.

Permission.description: A single permission on the note. Associates a member with a role.

group.email: Nihil vel distinctio est magni deleniti aut.

user.email: Explicabo et modi voluptatem deleniti qui suscipit.

Section.description: The content of the note. Either text or list content.

text.example: Omnis corrupti nisi veniam provident nobis omnis.

TextContent.description: The block of text for a single text section or list item.

email.example: Sit cum laudantium dolorem praesentium ipsum.

tags.name: media
tags.description: The media service handles attachment downloads.

tags.name: labels
tags.description: The labels service manages label resources.

tags.name: notes
tags.description: The notes service handles CRUD operations for notes.

tags.name: permissions
tags.description: The permissions service handles batch operations on note permissions.
